name: annotate-server
description: Lightweight backend for Annotate.js — multi-user sync via SQLite

scripts.kill-port: bash -c 'pid=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill -9 $pid && echo "Port 3000 freed (PID $pid)"; else echo "Port 3000 is already free"; fi'
